Name: 电力节约
ZHCN: 电力节约
ENUS: Energy Saving

Name: I电力节约
ZHCN:
采用智能控制系统，实时监控能源消耗、自动调节设备的运行状态，减少不必要的能耗。
<color="#FD965ECC">工厂电力需求 -10%</color>
ENUS:
By using intelligent control systems, real-time monitoring of energy consumption and automatic adjustment of equipment operating status can reduce unnecessary energy usage.
<color="#FD965ECC">Factory Power Demand -10%</color>

Name: 上传扩容
ZHCN: 上传扩容
ENUS: Upload Bandwidth Expansion

Name: I上传扩容
ZHCN:
通过提高上行带宽、更换高效传输协议、压缩数据并行上传，确保高效的数据传输。
<color="#FD965ECC">研究上传速度 +10%</color>
ENUS:
By increasing the upload bandwidth, switching to efficient transfer protocols, compressing data, and uploading in parallel, efficient data transmission can be ensured.
<color="#FD965ECC">Research Speed +10%</color>

Name: 燃料回收
ZHCN: 燃料回收
ENUS: Thermal Fuel Recycling

Name: I燃料回收
ZHCN:
优化电堆设计、改进控制策略、集成热电联产系统等措施的综合应用，可以有效提高燃料电池发电厂的效率。
<color="#FD965ECC">燃料电池效率 +20%</color>
ENUS:
The comprehensive application of measures such as optimizing stack design, improving control strategies, and integrating combined heat and power systems can effectively enhance the efficiency of fuel cell power plants.
<color="#FD965ECC">Fuel Cell Efficiency +20%</color>

Name: 风力扩容
ZHCN: 风力扩容
ENUS: Wind Turbine Capacity Expansion

Name: I风力扩容
ZHCN:
通过风力涡轮机与中央控制系统之间的数据交换实现对多台风力涡轮机的协调控制，优化整个风电场的能量输出。
<color="#FD965ECC">风力发电效率 +20%</color>
ENUS:
By enabling data exchange between wind turbines and the central control system, coordinated control of multiple wind turbines can be achieved, optimizing the energy output of the entire wind farm.
<color="#FD965ECC">Wind Turbine Efficiency +20%</color>

Name: 光伏扩容
ZHCN: 光伏扩容
ENUS: Solar Panel Capacity Expansion

Name: I光伏扩容

通过监测环境和气象条件，实现太阳能板的智能化管理和调度，从而提高能源利用效率。
<color="#FD965ECC">光伏发电效率 +20%</color>
ENUS:
By monitoring environmental and weather conditions, intelligent management and scheduling of solar panels can be achieved, thereby improving the efficiency of energy utilization.
<color="#FD965ECC">Solar Panel Efficiency +20%</color>

Name: 热聚增效
ZHCN: 热聚增效
ENUS: Artificial Star Efficiency

Name: I热聚增效
ZHCN:
通过改善磁场设计、增加磁场强度、研发新的等离子体稳定技术，减少等离子体的湍动和逃逸，从而提高能量密度和维持时间。
<color="#FD965ECC">聚变发电效率 +10%</color>
ENUS:
By improving the magnetic field design, increasing the magnetic field strength, and developing new plasma stabilization techniques, the turbulence and escape of the plasma can be reduced, thereby enhancing the energy density and confinement time.
<color="#FD965ECC">Artificial Star Efficiency +10%</color>

ZHCN: 资源采掘
ENUS: Unlimited Resource Mining

<color="#FD965ECC">矿物采集速度 +25%</color>
ENUS:
Optimize mining drill structures, streamline mineral sorting processes to comprehensively enhance mineral extraction efficiency.
<color="#FD965ECC">Mining Speed +25%</color>

ZHCN: 裂变增效
ENUS: Fission Efficiency

Name: I裂变增效

通过燃料再处理技术，回收未完全反应的铀和钍，减少核废料的产生，提高燃料利用率。
<color="#FD965ECC">裂变发电效率 +20%</color>
ENUS:
By using fuel reprocessing technology, unreacted uranium and thorium can be recovered, reducing the production of nuclear waste and improving fuel utilization.
<color="#FD965ECC">Fission Efficiency +20%</color>

Name: 先进推进
ZHCN: 先进推进
ENUS: Advanced Propulsion

Name: I先进推进
ZHCN:
使用空气动力学优化、发动机升级、先进自动驾驶算法等多种方法，实现更精确的飞行控制，提高运输机的速度和整体性能。
<color="#FD965ECC">配送物流速度 +25%</color>
ENUS:
By using methods such as aerodynamic optimization, engine upgrades, and advanced autopilot algorithms, more precise flight control can be achieved, improving the speed and overall performance of the transport aircraft.
<color="#FD965ECC">Drone Speed +25%</color>

Name: 特征向量模拟
ZHCN: 特征向量模拟
ENUS: Eigenvector Simulation

Name: I特征向量模拟
ZHCN:
根据机械能量计划的相关信息，模拟信号。降低由于电力因素导致的地面黑雾巢穴威胁度增长。
<color="#FD965ECC">电力威胁增长 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Analog signals based on information about the Mechanical Energy Program. Reduce the increase in threat level of Dark Fog ground nests due to factory power factors.
<color="#FD965ECC">Power Related Threat Growth -20%</color>

Name: 中继信号干扰
ZHCN: 中继信号干扰
ENUS: Relay Signal Interference

Name: I中继信号干扰
ZHCN:
干扰中继站与太空黑雾巢穴间的信号链路。降低由于地面战斗因素导致的太空黑雾巢穴威胁度增长。
<color="#FD965ECC">太空威胁增长 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Interferes with signaling links between relay stations and Dark Fog nests in space. Reduce the increase in the threat level of Dark Fog space nests due to ground combats.
<color="#FD965ECC">Space Threat Growth -20%</color>

Name: 神经元重编程
ZHCN: 神经元重编程
ENUS: Neuronal Reprogramming

Name: I神经元重编程
ZHCN:
利用现有黑雾残骸，重编程神经元后可干扰黑雾系统的运转模式。降低地面黑雾巢穴部队建造速度。
<color="#FD965ECC">部队建造速度 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Utilizes existing Dark Fog debris, reprogramming neurons can interfere with the Dark Fog system's mode of operation. Reduce the unit replication speed of Dark Fog ground nests.
<color="#FD965ECC">Unit Replication Speed -20%</color>

Name: 异常代码分析
ZHCN: 异常代码分析
ENUS: Abnormal Code Analysis

Name: I异常代码分析
ZHCN:
逆向分析残骸中的黑雾代码，并尝试利用机械能量计划的相关数据链路。降低地面黑雾巢穴基地扩张速度。
<color="#FD965ECC">基地扩张速度 -20%</color>
ENUS:
Reverse analyze the Dark Fog code in the wreckage and attempt to utilize the data link associated with the Mechanical Energy Program. Reduce the expansion speed of Dark Fog ground nests.
<color="#FD965ECC">Base Expansion Speed -20%</color>

Name: 海洋丛林介绍
ZHCN:
海洋丛林星球上有60%-70%的地表被淡水海洋所覆盖，丰沛的水资源在大陆上孕育出繁茂的雨林。
　　这里的赤道附近往往有连绵不绝的降雨，而纬度更低的地方则随着星球公转有鲜明的雨季和旱季之分。
　　海洋丛林星球上保有巨大的生物量，从而在漫长的演化史中将海洋中的可溶性矿物质逐渐转移到地壳和生物体内。在当地发展工业会动摇这个庞大复杂却又脆弱的生态系统，孰轻孰重，就看怎么取舍了。
ENUS:
Tropicana planets have 60 to 70 percent of their surface covered by bodies of flesh water, nurturing lush rainforests within the continents.
These biomes see continuous rainfall near the equator, while lower latitudes have distinct wet and dry seasons as the planet rotates.
Tropicanas retain a huge biomass, thus gradually transferring soluble minerals from the oceans to the crust and living organisms over its long evolutionary history. Any local industrial development will shake this large, complex, yet fragile ecosystem to its core, but what’s more important - nature, or progress?

Name: 戈壁介绍
ZHCN:
戈壁星球拥有极端稠密的二氧化碳大气层，导致昼夜温差极小，接近地表的地方风速也不高。
　　但无论这类星球曾经的模样如何，都已经被历史上无节制发展的化学工业毁掉了，目前只留下失控的温室效应带来的极高地表温度，以及地表上零星存在的硝酸湖泊。
ENUS:
Gobi planets have extremely dense carbon dioxide atmospheres, resulting in minimal temperature differences between day and night, and low wind speeds near the surface. 
But whatever such planets may have once looked like has been destroyed by the historically uncontrolled development of the chemical industry, leaving at present only extremely high surface temperatures due to the runaway greenhouse effect and the sporadic presence of nitric acid lakes on the surface.

Name: 黑石岩滩介绍
ZHCN:
黑石盐滩星球上拥有以氮气为主要成分的大气层，地表上覆盖着细腻的沙砾和盐花。
　　由于原料丰富，黑石盐滩星球曾作为主要的氯碱工业基地，目前地表上零星存在的盐酸湖泊就是它昔日辉煌的证明。
ENUS:
Halitum planets have an atmosphere dominated by nitrogen and a surface covered by fine sand and salt.
Due to the abundance of raw materials, it served as a major chlor-alkali industrial base, and the hydrochloric acid lakes that now exist sporadically on the surface are a testament to its former glory.

Name: 飓风石林介绍
ZHCN:
飓风石林星球的地表上散布着碎石，拥有一个主要成分为二氧化硫的稠密大气。
　　这类行星拥有活跃的板块构造结构，地震和火山活动频繁。此外，大气中的高浓度亚硫酸雾导致的频繁“酸雨”奇景，也曾是外星旅游爱好者论坛中的一大热门。
ENUS:
The surface of a Cyclonius planet is scattered with rocks under a dense atmosphere composed mainly of sulfur dioxide.
Such planets possess active tectonic structures with frequent earthquakes and volcanic activities. Additionally, the frequent 'acid rain' phenomenon caused by high concentrations of sulfate aerosols in the atmosphere has also been a popular topic on forums for extraterrestrial travel enthusiasts.

ENUS: Power Generation Boost

Name: 创世之书介绍标题
ZHCN: 创世之书MOD简介
ENUS: Genesis Book MOD Introduction

Name: 创世之书介绍前字
ZHCN:
星球调整：
    四种新矿物，硫、铝、铌、放射矿，矿物现在可在水下生成；
    为绝大多数类地行星添加了大气类型，并可使用大气采集站进行资源采集；
    新增海水海洋、盐酸海洋、硝酸海洋；
    行星协调中心，可自由选择多种协调增益您的工厂。

产线调整：
    新矿物相关的材料及配方；
    化工配方扩展，三种不同性能的塑料用于不同生产需求；
    矿物处理科技，允许将矿物预处理以提高产出或用于燃料电池；
    添加多种燃料棒，为伊卡洛斯的星际扩张保驾护航；
    建筑配方需求调整，将常用需求整合为机械组件，提高产线效率；
    产物溢出机制，允许副产物溢出保证生产连续性（可在设置中调整）。

建筑调整：
    制造台拆分为三种不同精度的制造类型，不可通用；
    对自动化生产属性进行提升，如供电范围、传送带、分拣器速度、制造台速度等；
    大气采集站、轨道采集器不再消耗电力，允许油井、大矿机在水上建造；
    发电功率调整，功率 = 建筑基础功率 * 燃料加成；
    燃料电池发电厂仅能在含氧大气环境下运行（燃料棒除外）；添加裂变电站、同位素温差发电机；
    黑雾建筑调整，黑雾制造台允许制造绝大多数配方，黑雾熔炉则可翻倍产出物品；
    巨型建筑：使用传送带传输原料和产物的制造中心，效率远超普通设备；
    物质分解设施，可将物品转换为沙土，亦可拆解建筑为制造材料。

科技调整：
    科技探索模式，隐藏暂不可研发的科技（可在设置中调整）；
    添加多种复合矩阵及对应科研需求；
    建造量子箱瞬间跨越星系输送物品；消耗负熵奇点进行远程折跃；使用全球护盾能源广播。

武器调整：
    生产铌钢弹头、核导弹；
    建造紫外激光塔、电磁加农炮；
    使用反物质跃迁导弹跨星支援。

其他调整：
    机甲燃料仓只能使用燃料棒进行供电；
    快速开局模式，让每一次冒险都能迅速展开。

Name: 巨型建筑介绍标题
ZHCN: 巨型建筑介绍
ENUS: Mega Buildings Introduction

Name: 巨型建筑介绍前字
ZHCN:
巨型建筑是一类具有高集成度的生产设施。虽然它们看起来与物流站很相似，但并不能装载物流运输机。

一个巨型建筑可将原料或产物通过传送带输出到下一个巨型建筑，从而高效利用占地。
ENUS:
Mega buildings are a class of production facilities with a high degree of integration. Although they look similar to a logistics station, they do not carry a logistics transporter. 

One mega building can export raw materials or products to the next mega building via a conveyor belt, thus making efficient use of space.

Name: 行星协调中心介绍标题
ZHCN: 行星协调中心
ENUS: Coordination Center Introduction

Name: 行星协调中心介绍前字
ZHCN: 一个行星协调中心可为星球工厂提供多种增益，可在星图中（默认快捷键为V键）切换增益以适应不同发展阶段的需求。
ENUS: A Planetary Coordination Center can provide multiple gains for a planetary factory, with the ability to switch gains in the starmap view (Default shortcut is V key) to accommodate different stages of development.

Name: 物质分解设施介绍标题
ZHCN: 物质分解设施
ENUS: Recycling Factory Introduction

Name: 物质分解设施介绍前字
ZHCN:
在选择<color="#FD965ECC">物质回收</color>配方后，物质分解设施可将输入到其中的所有物品按数量比例转换为沙土，并在达到一定数量后静默返还到机甲背包中。
若背包未满，输入的建筑物品可返还75%的制造原料到背包中。
ENUS:
After selecting <color="#FD965ECC">Matter recovery</color> recipe, the Recycling Factory converts all items entered into it into Sand in proportion to their quantity, and silently returns them to package after a certain amount has been reached.
Incoming construction items return 75% of their own manufacturing materials to the package (if the package is not full).

ENUS: After specialization, the assemblers can meet the needs of different precision, but except for the Dark Fog assembler, different assembler can not be used universally.

消耗1个<color="#FD965ECC">负熵奇点</color>与12GJ机甲能量，短暂开启通往虚数空间的通道，将机甲瞬时传送至<color="#FD965ECC">星图模式</color>中选定的任意星球。注意规避星轨交汇处的引力扰动。
<color="#FD965ECC">警告：</color>该科技的相关技术已被COSMO技术伦理委员会禁用，<color="#FD965ECC">请手动研究。</color>
ENUS:
Consumes 1 <color="#FD965ECC">Negentropy Singularity</color> and 12GJ mecha energy to briefly open a channel to imaginary space, instantaneously teleporting the mecha to any planet selected in <color="#FD965ECC">Star Map Mode</color>. Avoid gravitational disturbances at orbital intersections.
<color="#FD965ECC">Warning:</color> This technology has been prohibited by the COSMO Technology Ethics Committee. <color="#FD965ECC">Please initiate such research manually.</color>

Name: T基础机械组件
ZHCN: 基础机械组件
ENUS: Basic Mechanical Components

Name: T基础机械组件描述
ZHCN: 将标准化零件集成为模块化机械组件，大幅提升基础制造设备的装配效率。工业化的精髓在于模块化与集成化的设计理念。
ENUS: Integrating standardized parts into modular mechanical components greatly improves assembly efficiency of basic manufacturing equipment. The essence of industrialization lies in modular and integrated design concepts.

Name: T先进机械组件
ZHCN: 先进机械组件
ENUS: Advanced Mechanical Components

Name: T先进机械组件描述
ZHCN: 集成处理器芯片与钛合金材料的应用，使我们能够制造兼具结构强度与控制精度的先进生产设备。
ENUS: The application of integrated processor chips and titanium alloy materials enables us to manufacture advanced production equipment combining structural strength with control precision.

Name: T尖端机械组件
ZHCN: 尖端机械组件
ENUS: Sophisticated Mechanical Components

Name: T尖端机械组件描述
ZHCN: 大规模应用量子计算芯片与铌基超导材料，显著提升了航天发射设备的可靠性与极端环境适应能力。
ENUS: Large-scale application of quantum computing chips and niobium-based superconducting materials significantly improves the reliability and extreme environment adaptability of space launch equipment.

Name: T铌强化金属
ZHCN: 铌强化金属
ENUS: Niobium Alloy

Name: T铌强化金属描述
ZHCN: 采用粉末冶金工艺将纳米级铌颗粒弥散分布于金属基体中，形成的铌合金具有优异的高温强度与抗蠕变性能，适用于极端工况下的结构件制造。
ENUS: Using powder metallurgy to disperse nanometer-scale niobium particles in metal matrix—the resulting niobium alloy exhibits excellent high-temperature strength and creep resistance, suitable for structural component manufacturing under extreme operating conditions.

Name: T虚拟技术革新
ZHCN: 家园世界: 虚拟技术革新
ENUS: Homeworld: Virtual technology innovation

Name: T虚拟技术革新描述
ZHCN: 光学计算技术的诞生标志着信息革命的又一次飞跃。以光脉冲替代电子信号，从根本上解决了集成电路的热耗散瓶颈；而基于天然光栅石的新型光波导介质，则将数据传输速率提升至前所未有的量级。据悉，主脑维持的家园世界已全面采用该技术架构。
ENUS: The birth of optical computing technology marks another leap in the information revolution. Replacing electronic signals with light pulses fundamentally solves the thermal dissipation bottleneck of integrated circuits; while new optical waveguide media based on natural grating stones have elevated data transmission rates to unprecedented magnitudes. It is reported that the homeworld maintained by the Mastermind has fully adopted this technical architecture.

Name: T光学信息传输技术
ZHCN: 家园世界: 光学信息传输技术
ENUS: Homeworld: Optical information transfer technology

Name: T光学信息传输技术描述
ZHCN: 以天然光栅石晶体为芯材拉制的特种光纤，其独特的光子带隙结构可将光信号传输损耗降至极低水平，开启超高速信息时代。
ENUS: Special optical fibers drawn from natural grating stone crystal cores—their unique photonic bandgap structures reduce optical signal transmission losses to extremely low levels, ushering in the era of ultra-high-speed information.

Name: T超级量子计算机
ZHCN: 超级量子计算机
ENUS: Super Nano Computer

Name: T超级量子计算机描述
ZHCN: 成熟的量子纠错与相干保持技术，是衡量文明计算能力的关键指标。在主脑的评估体系中，这是科技树的重要分水岭节点。
ENUS: Mature quantum error correction and coherence maintenance technologies are key indicators for measuring civilization's computing capabilities. In the Mastermind's evaluation system, this is an important watershed node in the technology tree.

Name: T光学计算机
ZHCN: 家园世界: 光学计算机
ENUS: Homeworld: Optical Computer

Name: T光学计算机描述
ZHCN: 采用光子集成电路与全光互连技术构建的新一代计算系统，在运算速度与能效比上全面超越传统电子计算机。
ENUS: A new generation computing system built with photonic integrated circuits and all-optical interconnection technology, comprehensively surpassing traditional electronic computers in computing speed and energy efficiency ratio.

Name: T铌强化玻璃
ZHCN: 铌强化玻璃
ENUS: Niobium Glass

Name: T铌强化玻璃描述
ZHCN: 在玻璃熔制过程中引入纳米氧化铌颗粒作为增强相，形成的深黑色复合材料具有极高的硬度与断裂韧性，在极端压力环境下表现优异。
ENUS: Introducing nanometer niobium oxide particles as reinforcement phase during glass melting—the resulting deep black composite material exhibits extremely high hardness and fracture toughness, performing excellently in extreme pressure environments.

Name: T先进有机合成技术
ZHCN: 先进有机合成技术
ENUS: Advanced Organic Synthesis Technology

Name: T先进有机合成技术描述
ZHCN: 掌握分子级别的有机合成路径设计，可定向制备高能化学推进剂与特种聚合物材料。
ENUS: Mastering molecular-level organic synthesis pathway design, capable of定向制备 high-energy chemical propellants and specialty polymer materials.

Name: T放射性矿物提炼
ZHCN: 放射性矿物提炼
ENUS: Radioactive Ore Purification

Name: T放射性矿物提炼描述
ZHCN: 采用碱熔-浸出联合工艺，以大量氢氧化钠分解放射性矿物晶格，使微量铀、钍元素转化为可溶性盐类，经萃取分离与沉淀转化后直接制得裂变燃料。
ENUS: Employing combined alkali fusion-leaching process, using large amounts of sodium hydroxide to decompose radioactive mineral lattice—converting trace uranium and thorium elements into soluble salts, directly producing fissile fuel through extraction separation and precipitation conversion.

Name: T同位素温差发电
ZHCN: 同位素温差发电
ENUS: Radioisotope Thermoelectric Generator

Name: T同位素温差发电描述
ZHCN: MOX燃料棒在衰变过程中释放持续热能，通过热电偶阵列的塞贝克效应直接转换为电能，无需运动部件即可长期稳定运行。
ENUS: MOX fuel rods release sustained thermal energy during decay, directly converted to electricity through the Seebeck effect of thermocouple arrays—capable of long-term stable operation without moving parts.

Name: T裂变能源燃料棒
ZHCN: 裂变能源燃料棒
ENUS: Fission Fuel Rod

Name: T裂变能源燃料棒描述
ZHCN: 采用铀或钍的氧化物经粉末冶金压制烧结成型，封装于合金包壳管中，可在裂变反应堆中实现可控链式反应并释放大量热能。
ENUS: Uranium or thorium oxides pressed and sintered through powder metallurgy, encapsulated in alloy cladding tubes—capable of sustaining controlled chain reactions and releasing substantial thermal energy in fission reactors.

Name: T聚变燃料提取
ZHCN: 聚变燃料提取
ENUS: Fusion Isotope Extraction

Name: T聚变燃料提取描述
ZHCN: 光栅石独特的层状晶格具有选择性吸附氦原子的特性，通过高温脱附工艺可高效富集氦同位素，为聚变燃料制备提供替代来源。
ENUS: The unique layered lattice of grating stone exhibits selective adsorption of helium atoms—high-temperature desorption processes enable efficient enrichment of helium isotopes, providing an alternative source for fusion fuel preparation.

Name: T聚变能源燃料棒
ZHCN: 聚变能源燃料棒
ENUS: Fusion Fuel Rod

Name: T聚变能源燃料棒描述
ZHCN: 以重氢或氦三氘混合物为燃料芯体，通过磁惯性约束实现热核聚变，是清洁高效的未来能源载体。
ENUS: Using deuterium or helium-3-deuterium mixtures as fuel cores, achieving thermonuclear fusion through magneto-inertial confinement—a clean and efficient future energy carrier.

Name: T天穹装配厂
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 天穹装配厂
ENUS: Mega Buildings: The Cosmic Assembler

Name: T天穹装配厂描述
ZHCN: 采用分布式智能控制架构与高速磁悬浮输送系统的大型集成制造设施，单位面积产出效率达到标准制造单元的数倍，可处理绝大多数工业产品的精密装配任务。
ENUS: Large-scale integrated manufacturing facility employing distributed intelligent control architecture and high-speed magnetic levitation conveying systems—output efficiency per unit area reaches several times that of standard assemblers, capable of handling precision assembly tasks for the vast majority of industrial products.

Name: T物质裂解塔
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 物质裂解塔
ENUS: Mega Buildings: The Cosmic Splitting Factory

Name: T物质裂解塔描述
ZHCN: 以磁约束聚变装置为核心能源，配备多级感应等离子体炬的巨型冶炼设施，可将原矿一步还原为高纯度单质，矿物利用率接近理论极限。
ENUS: Giant smelting facility with magnetically confined fusion device as core energy source, equipped with multi-stage induction plasma torches—capable of one-step reduction of raw ore to high-purity elements, with mineral utilization approaching theoretical limits.

Name: T行星级化学反应釜
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 行星级化学反应釜
ENUS: Mega Buildings: Planetary Chemical Reaction Kettle

Name: T行星级化学反应釜描述
ZHCN: 直径达数公里的超大型化工综合体，集成万级反应单元与全自动化物流网络，单厂产能即可满足整颗星球的化工原料需求。
ENUS: Super-large chemical complex several kilometers in diameter, integrating ten-thousand-level reaction units with fully automated logistics networks—single-factory capacity sufficient to meet the chemical raw material needs of an entire planet.

Name: T精密结构组装厂
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 精密结构组装厂
ENUS: Mega Buildings: Super Precise Assembly Factory

Name: T精密结构组装厂描述
ZHCN: 配备纳米级定位精度机械臂与洁净室环境的超精密制造中心，可批量生产量子芯片、光学元件等尖端科技产品。
ENUS: Ultra-precision manufacturing center equipped with nanometer-level positioning robotic arms and cleanroom environments—capable of mass-producing cutting-edge technology products such as quantum chips and optical components.

Name: T物质分解设施
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 物质分解设施
ENUS: Mega Buildings: Recycling Factory

Name: T物质分解设施描述
ZHCN:
利用高能光子束将物质解构至原子级别，再通过量子重组技术将其转化为标准沙土形态。该过程遵循质能守恒定律，是处理工业废弃物的终极方案。
[产出的物品将直接存入机甲背包]
ENUS:
Utilizing high-energy photon beams to deconstruct matter to atomic level, then transforming it into standard sand form through quantum reorganization technology. This process follows mass-energy conservation laws—the ultimate solution for industrial waste treatment.
[Produced items will be directly deposited into mecha backpack]

Name: T巨型粒子对撞机
ZHCN: 巨型建筑: 巨型粒子对撞机
ENUS: Mega Buildings: Mega Particle Collider

Name: T巨型粒子对撞机描述
ZHCN: 由数百条超导环形轨道并行构成的粒子加速阵列，可持续产生反物质，将高能物理研究推向新的高度。
ENUS: Particle acceleration array composed of hundreds of parallel superconducting ring tracks—capable of continuously generating antimatter, pushing high-energy physics research to new heights.

Name: T巨型建筑工程学
ZHCN: 巨型建筑工程学
ENUS: Mega Buildings Engineering

Name: T巨型建筑工程学描述
ZHCN: 随着工业规模的指数级扩张，传统分布式生产模式面临占地与物流瓶颈。发展高度集成的巨型建筑技术，实现单位面积产出的革命性突破，已成为必然选择。
ENUS: With exponential expansion of industrial scale, traditional distributed production models face land occupation and logistics bottlenecks. Developing highly integrated mega-building technology to achieve revolutionary breakthroughs in output per unit area has become an inevitable choice.

Name: T化学能燃料棒描述
ZHCN: 以高密度四氢双环戊二烯（JP-10）为能量载体，通过催化重整反应释放化学能，为早期星际航行器与机甲提供可靠动力源。
ENUS: Using high-density tetrahydrocyclopentadiene (JP-10) as energy carrier, releasing chemical energy through catalytic reforming reactions—providing reliable power sources for early interstellar spacecraft and mechas.

Name: T先进化工
ZHCN: 先进化工
ENUS: Advanced Chemicals

Name: T先进化工描述
ZHCN: 开发具有特殊功能基团的新型高分子材料，为极端环境下的工业生产提供材料基础。
ENUS: Developing novel polymer materials with special functional groups, providing material foundations for industrial production in extreme environments.

Name: T焦油精炼
ZHCN: 焦油精炼
ENUS: Tar Refining

Name: T焦油精炼描述
ZHCN: 通过分馏、萃取、加氢等单元操作，从复杂的多环芳烃混合物中分离提取苯、丙烯等基础化工原料，实现煤炭资源的高值化利用。
ENUS: Through unit operations such as fractionation, extraction, and hydrogenation, separating and extracting basic chemical raw materials such as benzene and propylene from complex polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon mixtures—achieving high-value utilization of coal resources.

Name: T行星协调中心
ZHCN: 行星协调中心
ENUS: Coordination Center

Name: T行星协调中心描述
ZHCN: 部署于星球表面的巨型分布式计算与控制中心，通过实时采集全星球生产数据，运用人工智能算法动态优化资源配置，显著提升整体工业效率。
ENUS: Giant distributed computing and control center deployed on planetary surface—collecting real-time global production data, utilizing artificial intelligence algorithms to dynamically optimize resource allocation, significantly improving overall industrial efficiency.

Name: 行星协调中心文字描述
ZHCN: 在星图界面（默认快捷键V）可切换本星球的协调增益模式，以适应不同发展阶段的生产需求。
ENUS: In the starmap interface (default shortcut V), you can switch the coordination gain mode of this planet to adapt to production needs at different development stages.

Name: T物品仓储描述
ZHCN: \cwc1-;可直接搭建于四向分流器上方，实现紧凑的立体仓储布局；\cwc2-;则提供双倍于基础版本的存储容量，适合大规模原料储备。
ENUS: \cwc1-; can be built directly on top of Splitters for compact three-dimensional storage layouts; \cwc2-; provides double the storage capacity of the basic version, suitable for large-scale raw material reserves.

Name: T物品仓储结果
ZHCN: 你已解锁\cwc1-;与\cwc2-;，可将采集的矿物与中间产物集中存储，优化产线物流效率。
ENUS: You have unlocked \cwc1-; and \cwc2-;, capable of centrally storing collected minerals and intermediate products, optimizing production line logistics efficiency.

Name: X射线裂解描述
ZHCN: 利用同步辐射X射线的高能光子催化作用，打断焦油分子中的碳-氢键与碳-碳键，定向裂解为氢气与高结晶度石墨。
ENUS: Utilizing high-energy photon catalysis of synchrotron radiation X-rays to break carbon-hydrogen and carbon-carbon bonds in tar molecules, directional cracking into hydrogen and high-crystallinity graphite.

Name: RX射线裂解
ZHCN: 在X射线辐照下，焦油发生光催化裂解反应，生成氢气与高能石墨两种高附加值产物。
ENUS: Under X-ray irradiation, tar undergoes photocatalytic cracking reactions, generating two high value-added products: hydrogen and energetic graphite.

Name: 高强度玻璃描述
ZHCN: 在硅酸盐玻璃熔体中加入一定比例的钛作为晶核剂，经控制析晶形成微晶玻璃相，显著提升机械强度与耐热冲击性能。
ENUS: Adding a certain proportion of titanium to silicate glass melt as a nucleating agent, forming glass-ceramic phases through controlled crystallization—significantly improving mechanical strength and thermal shock resistance.

Name: 奇异物质描述
ZHCN: 在氘聚变产生的极端高温高压条件下，物质被压缩至核密度级别，夸克物质突破禁闭态形成奇异夸克团。
ENUS: Under extreme temperature and pressure conditions generated by deuterium fusion, matter is compressed to nuclear density levels—quark matter breaks through confinement states to form strange quark clusters.

Name: 基础物流系统描述
ZHCN:
利用<color="#FD965ECC">传送带</color>构建物料输送主干网络，配合<color="#FD965ECC">分拣器</color>实现精准投料，奠定自动化生产的基础。
<color="#FD965ECC">四向分流器</color>可实现物料的分配、合并与均衡，按TAB键切换三种工作模式。
ENUS:
Utilizing <color="#FD965ECC">conveyor belts</color> to construct material transportation backbone networks, cooperating with <color="#FD965ECC">sorters</color> to achieve precise feeding—laying the foundation for automated production.
<color="#FD965ECC">Splitters</color> can distribute, merge, and balance materials; press TAB to switch between three operating modes.

Name: 改良物流系统描述
ZHCN: 将<color="#FD965ECC">流速监测器</color>安装于传送带上方，可实时采集物流数据并设置阈值触发警报，部分工程师甚至用它构建逻辑电路演奏音乐。
ENUS: Installing <color="#FD965ECC">Traffic Monitors</color> above conveyor belts enables real-time logistics data acquisition with threshold-based alarm triggering—some engineers even use them to build logic circuits for playing music.

Name: I裂变能源发电站
ZHCN: 采用金属燃料快中子谱设计，以液态钠为冷却介质，集成在线电解精炼后处理系统，实现燃料闭式循环与废物最小化。
ENUS: Employing metal-fueled fast neutron spectrum design with liquid sodium as coolant, integrated with online electrorefining reprocessing system—achieving closed fuel cycle and waste minimization.

Name: T裂变发电站描述
ZHCN: 金属燃料、液态钠冷却、干式贮存与高度自动化技术的综合应用，使快中子反应堆在输出大功率的同时实现燃料闭式循环，从根本上解决核废料处置难题。

Name: I反物质湮灭单元

想要激活它只需要三步：同时按下两侧的按钮解除保险，将单元向两侧拉开进入待击发状态，然后合上它。当然，我们不建议您这么做，使用电子引信激活更加可靠，也不会对您造成伤害。
ENUS:
One of the industrialized ways of applying controlled annihilation reaction, the original radioactive charge was replaced by positive and negative matter poles. 
To activate it you only need three steps: press the buttons on both sides at the same time to deactivate the safety, pull the unit away to the sides into a ready-to-fire state, and then close it. Of course, we don't recommend that you do this; using an electronic fuse to activate it is much more reliable and won't harm you.
